privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Natural Earth Vector (ne_110m_admin_0_countries and ne_110m_populated_places datasets). The countries file contains exactly 177 country features. The population threshold is 5,000,000. The five check countries (China, United States of America, Japan, India, Brazil) are all present in the dataset. Ground truth megacity counts: China=3, USA=4, Japan=2, India=3, Brazil=2. Ground truth population sums: China=33,299,000, USA=46,115,000, Japan=46,970,000, India=40,552,000, Brazil=30,593,000.
